CAMPAIGN 1
(AD TESTING)
Ad Testing Cheatsheet -
Grad Testing Phase 2
GOAL: Find winning ads with proven audiences
1. Create new CBOs which only contains ad
sets/audiences proven to be working in Phase 1.
2. Use these proven ad sets to bring more ads/angles
into play via testing; creatives fatigue faster than
audiences so we want to remain 2 steps ahead
3. Budget and MINIMUM ad set budgets set as per
Phase 1. Whilst you do not have to set a minimum
budget spend at the ad set level, during test phase this
helps to ensure a more even spend
3. Cycle through creative testing sharing post IDs and
duplicating ads as before in Phase 1
4. The testing period as before will be roughly 48-72
hours depending on audience size and spend.
5. Once you find winning ads - this time you will need to
make a choice:
a) if you NEED these ads in your prospecting/scaling ad
sets, then use the Post ID (if the ad format permits this)
and share it to your prospecting/scaling ad set. Set this
live between 6-9am ad account time ideally. Note: whilst
you can launch the ad as INACTIVE in your ad set at a
later time, this is still considered an ad set 'edit' and
could disrupt performance
b) if you DO NOT need this ad right now, create a
'holding' PPE (engagement) campaign targeting your
best audience(s) or, if you have over 100K page fans,
targeting fans, to simply allow the ad to rack up
engagement/social proof (likes, shares, comments). Set
a meaningful budget, anywhere from $50 to $500 per
day depending on overall account spend and let these
run to keep the ads live and collecting history. When you
want to use these ads, share the Post ID (if permitted)
into the ad set(s) that require the ad.

Notes:
Winning Ads either pass to our Prospecting Phase 3
campaigns and/or go into a holding PPE campaign as
described above (if we can share Post IDs for the post
format) to bulk up on juicy social proof. However ad
sets do not pass beyond this stage as they have already
moved to Phase 3.
The bulk of our ad testing will occur here, with proven
audiences.
The next phase, which is Prospecting, takes proven
audience and proven ads to find stability and profitability
before we move them into Scaling.
www.getwsodo.com
